_credits: Community spreadsheet by Dracorath (rumor credit: Guitaraholic; Travic guide linked). NOT official data.
official_054_changes: 0.5.4 added an Expedition Atlas Passive Skill Tree; points earned by defeating each Boss in The Grand Expedition questline.
0.5.4 added Liquid Verisium (from Farrow after allocating Feeling Lucky?) to immediately start a Runic Remnant Encounter.
Grand Expeditions now have 1-2 Expedition Map Modifiers (Runic Monster Markers, duplicated Runic Monsters, additional Remnants).
Remnants now choose which Rune slot propagates to later monsters.
Doryani's Refined Formula: Grand Expeditions have only 5 Explosives (overrides max 1 for Expeditions).
0.5.4b + Hotfix 3 fixed multiple Expedition bugs including Verisium Remnant interaction after Liquid Verisium.

rumours.details: Unique Expedition Map with 9-10 Rune to unlock
rumours.note: High-priority; Aldurs exception applies (only unique map worth Aldurs).

rumours.details: Less XP than a City map
Good map; focus on juicing the rogue exiles
Good map; juice remnants for boss/good runes
Can spawn in bad location; run if adjacent logbook zone is empty
Can juice a strong boss with wisps
Check runes otherwise go for currency tiles

rumours.note: Strong, but do not use Aldurs on Boss.

sagas.name: Aldurs
sagas.note: Can be a gamble on the seed
sagas.rule: Use only with 3 rumours; never on Boss; never on unique maps except Fallen Skies.

sagas.name: Medved
sagas.note: Guarantees boss encounter (sheet spells it Medhed)

aldurs_rules: Do not use Aldurs on Boss.
Do not use Aldurs on a Unique map unless it is Fallen Skies.
Use Aldurs if there are 3 rumours.
Do not use Aldurs if there are only 2 rumours (less content).
Before using Aldurs, make sure rumours do not change before confirming.
More than 5 rune slots is highly favorable.
Fish by enabling/disabling Sagas to change rumours.
tips: Run 3x other-tablet strats on any map in between Grand Expeditions; this means current shared/Irradiated/map juice, not Expedition Tablets.
Make sure you are capped on rarity (spreadsheet advice).
Logbook farm: 2 red flags on one pole gives rare monsters that could drop logbooks (spreadsheet note).

current_juice_rule.summary: When current notes or guides say to juice Expedition, interpret that as juicing the surrounding maps/logbooks/whispers with other current tablets, waystone/map modifiers, Atlas Master choices, and remnant order. It does not mean buying, filtering, or recommending Expedition Tablets.
current_juice_rule.current_game_rule: Expedition Tablets do not exist in the current game; old Expedition Tablet rows are legacy only.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Pack Size
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: Safe default density for maps around Grand Expeditions and whisper/logbook routes.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Rare Monsters
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: Matches the sheet note that rare monsters can matter for logbook drops and general Expedition-value maps.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Monster Rarity
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: Pairs with the spreadsheet advice to cap rarity when farming Expedition rewards.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Item Rarity
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: Generic rarity stacking for Grand Expedition style mapping and rare/boss loot.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Waystone Quantity
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: Sustain option while chaining maps between Grand Expeditions.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Monster Effectiveness
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: High-investment Expedition-style map juice; dangerous and should be avoided by weak builds.

recommended_other_tablet_filters.label: Additional Random Modifier
recommended_other_tablet_filters.why: High-investment multiplier for strong builds only.

recommended_current_presets.label: Any Tablet - Safe Currency Juice
recommended_current_presets.why: Use when a note only says to juice Expedition and no high-risk instruction is given.

recommended_current_presets.label: Any Tablet - High-Investment Juice
recommended_current_presets.why: Use only when the build can handle dangerous stacked map mods.

recommended_current_presets.label: Irradiated - Area Level/Tablet Farm Juice
recommended_current_presets.why: Relevant when the plan is area-level/tablet/currency farming around the Expedition route.

atlas_master_support.why: Expedition explosive radius/range control; Grand Expeditions have 5 explosives.
More Runic Monster Markers and Rare Expedition Monsters.
Verisium Remnants can roll an additional time, keeping rarest outcome.

current_juice_rule.app_behavior: Show this in Expedition Whispers as the current Expedition juice interpretation. Do not expose Expedition Tablet trade filters as current.

remnant_rule: CRITICAL: Remnant bonuses are NOT retroactive. Detonation order and pathing determine which monsters are affected.
avoid_warnings: Guaranteed critical strikes on monsters unless the build is very durable.
Monster effectiveness/damage stacks on weak builds.
F-rank maps (It's dry at least / Bleak and Awful) until the untargetable-enemy issue is verified fixed.
Aldurs Saga on Boss maps or low-rumour maps.

grand_vs_standard.standard: Logbook sustain and routine rewards. Expedition tree and remnant propagation changes apply.
grand_vs_standard.grand: High-value rune/remnant payoff. 1-2 modifiers baseline; map icon; Doryani 5-explosive behavior. Use Aldurs only with strong conditions.
grand_vs_standard.open_question: Whether logbooks can drop from Grands and exact expected value — UNVERIFIED.

_owner_update: 2026-07-05: Expeditions are no longer tablets in the current season - they work through logbooks and WHISPERS (the rumour system below). When current notes say to juice Expedition, they mean other current tablets/map juice/Atlas Masters/remnants around the Expedition route, not Expedition Tablets. Old Expedition Tablet modifier data is legacy.
